reasoning: This scenario focuses on reducing delays in the sepsis treatment pathway by addressing bottlenecks at ER Registration, lab turnaround times, and admission wait times. Modifications are constrained by fixed lab staffing and regulatory requirements, with a redeployment of one nurse practitioner during peak hours to prioritize sepsis-suspect cases. The changes aim to minimize time to antibiotic administration while maintaining compliance with operational constraints.
